selections.option: AI-assisted design-to-development automation workspace
selections.label: 项目定位：AI-assisted design-to-development automation workspace
selections.purpose: merge structured design authoring, DevFlow stage orchestration, artifact validation, and UCOS memory into one movable project.

selections.option: Windows desktop application with Python CLI pipeline support
selections.label: 平台：Windows desktop application with Python CLI pipeline support
selections.purpose: run the GUI design tool and command-line development stages from the same project root.

selections.option: game designers, technical designers, and Unity developers
selections.label: 目标玩家：game designers, technical designers, and Unity developers
selections.purpose: support repeated design decisions, validation, handoff, and implementation review.

selections.option: internal production tool and reusable automation framework
selections.label: 商业模式：internal production tool and reusable automation framework
selections.purpose: prioritize correctness, traceability, migration safety, and local execution over marketing presentation.

selections.option: load design knowledge -> choose structured decisions -> export Concept package -> run DevFlow stages -> review artifacts
selections.label: 核心循环：load design knowledge -> choose structured decisions -> export Concept package -> run DevFlow stages -> review artifacts
selections.purpose: make each design-to-development handoff explicit and testable.

selections.option: manual handoff drift, stale absolute paths, missing source packages, and unverifiable development outputs
selections.label: 压力来源：manual handoff drift, stale absolute paths, missing source packages, and unverifiable development outputs
selections.purpose: turn migration risks into validation checks before actual Unity project mutation.

selections.option: immediate stage summaries, validation reports, package manifests, and build artifacts
selections.label: 奖励节奏：immediate stage summaries, validation reports, package manifests, and build artifacts
selections.purpose: give operators fast feedback after every design or development stage.

selections.option: Design Engine
selections.label: system_layer：Design Engine
selections.purpose: load domain schemas, templates, prompt frameworks, and project templates from data/design.

selections.option: DevFlow Orchestrator
selections.label: system_layer：DevFlow Orchestrator
selections.purpose: execute stages 00-15 with preflight, artifact generation, validation, and review gates.

selections.option: Artifact Layer
selections.label: system_layer：Artifact Layer
selections.purpose: record stage outputs, manifests, validation reports, and review status.

selections.option: UCOS Memory
selections.label: system_layer：UCOS Memory
selections.purpose: preserve migrated procedural, episodic, and framework knowledge for repeated runs.

selections.option: design domains, entity schemas, project templates, prompt frameworks, saved projects, source packages, and exported reports
selections.label: 内容：design domains, entity schemas, project templates, prompt frameworks, saved projects, source packages, and exported reports
selections.purpose: keep authoring content and runtime artifacts separated while preserving legacy data.

selections.option: Python modules, JSON schemas, TOML configuration, Markdown documents, Unity project settings, and PyInstaller build output
selections.label: 资源：Python modules, JSON schemas, TOML configuration, Markdown documents, Unity project settings, and PyInstaller build output
selections.purpose: make required runtime resources discoverable from .project_root.

selections.option: GUI launch, D-stage plugin execution, Concept package export, DevFlow stage execution, preflight checks, tests, and packaging
selections.label: 运行时：GUI launch, D-stage plugin execution, Concept package export, DevFlow stage execution, preflight checks, tests, and packaging
selections.purpose: support both interactive design work and repeatable command-line validation.

selections.option: Tkinter desktop shell, stage summaries, validation JSON, Markdown reviews, and command output reports
selections.label: 表现：Tkinter desktop shell, stage summaries, validation JSON, Markdown reviews, and command output reports
selections.purpose: surface operational state without hiding machine-readable artifacts.

selections.option: root-marker path resolution, TOML/JSON config loading, manifest-based plugins, legacy adapters, pytest checks, and PyInstaller packaging
selections.label: 技术：root-marker path resolution, TOML/JSON config loading, manifest-based plugins, legacy adapters, pytest checks, and PyInstaller packaging
selections.purpose: make the merged project relocatable and independently verifiable.

selections.option: migrate legacy assets, validate structure, run smoke stages, export Concept package, preflight Unity settings, run tests, and build executable
selections.label: 生产：migrate legacy assets, validate structure, run smoke stages, export Concept package, preflight Unity settings, run tests, and build executable
selections.purpose: turn the original merge plan into a repeatable delivery workflow.

selections.option: path independence, source package compatibility, legacy save preservation, stage contract stability, and Unity mutation boundary
selections.label: 影响：path independence, source package compatibility, legacy save preservation, stage contract stability, and Unity mutation boundary
selections.purpose: make the risky parts of the merge visible before full development execution.
